api_key.description: Watchmode API key. Sent as the apiKey query parameter on every request; never logged.

base_url.description: Watchmode API base URL override for tests or proxies.

search_val.description: Search term for the search stream's search_value query parameter (matched against title name). Defaults to 'Terminator', matching legacy's in-code default.

start_date.description: Optional start_date query parameter forwarded to the search stream when set.

regions.description: Optional comma-separated region codes (e.g. US,CA) forwarded to the titles, sources, releases, and title_sources streams when set.

types.description: Optional comma-separated title types (e.g. movie,tv_series) forwarded to the titles and changes new_titles streams when set.

title_ids.description: Comma-, whitespace-, or semicolon-separated Watchmode title IDs to fan out over for the title_details/title_sources/title_seasons/title_episodes/title_cast_crew streams (one request per id). Required for those 5 streams only; other streams do not reference it.

person_ids.description: Comma-, whitespace-, or semicolon-separated Watchmode person IDs to fan out over for the person_details stream (one request per id). Required for that stream only.

page_size.description: Optional limit query parameter forwarded to the titles and changes-feed streams (list-titles/changes endpoints' page size). Watchmode defaults these to 250 server-side when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
